response: Both Deerhunter and Nine Lashes are American Christian rock bands. Deerhunter is an American rock band from Atlanta, Georgia, formed in 2001, and consists of Bradford Cox (vocals, guitar, keyboards), Moses Archuleta (drums, electronics, sound treatments), Lockett Pundt (guitar, vocals, keyboards), Josh McKay (bass), and Javier Morales (keyboards, synthesizers, alto saxophone) and Rhasaan Manning (percussion, electronics). Nine Lashes is an American Christian rock band from Birmingham, Alabama, formed in 2006, and consists of members who independently released their first album, "Escape," in 2009 before signing with Tooth & Nail Records. Both bands are known for their Christian rock music and have contributed to the Christian rock scene in the United States.
